description: Data sourced via yfinance / Yahoo Finance. Approximation.

observations.note: RG values not computable: fundamental base is zero or negative (tangible equity negative and smoothed earnings negative across all window sizes). The company's earnings do not provide a positive fundamental base at any smoothing horizon.

Annual historical observation. Market cap approximated from historical close price × current shares outstanding. Earnings smoothed from available annual data. Approximation.
